meta.description: CDE F2 algebraic firewall netlist — default 32-bit / 4-row tiled Hamming(7,4) SEC-DED configuration
meta.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Justin Arndt. All rights reserved. GNU GPLv3.
meta.invariant: Tiled Hamming(7,4) parity-check matrix across 4x7-bit blocks [27:0] with overall parity on [31:0]

syndrome_bits.label: s0_p0_tiled
syndrome_bits.description: Hamming p0 (bit-index bit 0 set) tiled across four 7-bit blocks. Checks column positions where the 1-based bit index has its LSB set: {1,3,5,7} per block.

syndrome_bits.label: s1_p1_tiled
syndrome_bits.description: Hamming p1 (bit-index bit 1 set) tiled across four 7-bit blocks. Checks column positions where the 1-based bit index has bit 1 set: {2,3,6,7} per block, mapping to 0-indexed {1,2,5,6} per block.

syndrome_bits.label: s2_p2_tiled
syndrome_bits.description: Hamming p2 (bit-index bit 2 set) tiled across four 7-bit blocks. Checks column positions where the 1-based bit index has bit 2 set: {4,5,6,7} per block.

syndrome_bits.label: s3_overall_parity
syndrome_bits.description: Overall parity across all 32 bits. Extends the SEC Hamming code to SEC-DED: detects double-bit errors that the first three syndrome rows would miss.

xor_tree.description: Each syndrome bit is computed as the reduction XOR of (state & mask). The synthesizer maps this to a balanced binary XOR tree of depth ceil(log2(tap_count)).
